message:
🐛 fix: remove CNCF install missions with fabricated/dead kubectl apply URLs (#1459)

Cadence maintainer flagged that their install mission referenced a
non-existent K8s manifest URL. Audit found additional missions with
dead URLs.

Deleted 16 missions where ALL kubectl apply URLs return 404:
- install-cadence-workflow (confirmed by maintainer: no K8s manifests)
- install-cartography
- install-chaosblade
- install-devfile
- install-kgateway
- install-kpt
- install-kuasar
- install-metal3-io
- install-oras
- install-ovn-kubernetes
- install-runme-notebooks
- install-schemahero
- install-slimtoolkit
- install-submariner
- install-virtual-kubelet
- install-vitess

Fixed 2 missions with mixed working/dead URLs:
- install-contour: replaced dead RBAC URL with kubectl check
- install-kyverno: replaced dead policy URL with Helm chart install

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
